title: Voidable
description: Adds some new things that may or may not be connected to the void.
body:
# This mod is still under construction!
## Currently in the mod:
* New bedrock texture cause the old one looks stinky
* New Void Waste item which will be the main ingridient
* Void Carved Statues which will be metalic warden-like body guards(still a W.I.P.)

  ### The Mod isn't fully out yet some stuff might change or get reworked over time!
  if you find any bugs please report them to me!
  Discord: boxedboi
